zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord John Massey於1344年出生在英國英格蘭爾塔頓時，他的父親Sir Hugh Massey24歲，母親Alice de Wrenbury24歲。他和Alice Worsley至少有8個兒子和6個女兒。他於1389年被列為sheriff of cheshire。他去世於1403年7月22日在英國英格蘭史洛普爾史福斯波利享年59歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾史福斯波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord John Massey于1344年出生在英国英格兰爾塔頓时，他的父亲Sir Hugh Massey24岁，母亲Alice de Wrenbury24岁。他和Alice Worsley至少有8个儿子和6个女儿。他于1389年被列为sheriff of cheshire。他去世于1403年7月22日在英国英格兰史洛普爾史福斯波利享年59岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾史福斯波利。

nameMeanings.name: Massey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Massy, a pet form of Matthew . Compare Mace .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from one or more of several places in Normandy, such as Macey (Manche), Massy (Seine-Maritime), Macé-sur-Orne (Orne), and La Ferté Macé (Orne).

variants.name: Mace
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Masse, probably a shortened form of Matthew (compare Massey and Massett ) or possibly of Thomas .
French and Breton (Macé): from the French personal name Macé, a vernacular form of Mathieu ‘Matthew’. Compare Masse 5 and Maze 3.

French (Macé): habitational name from Macé or La Ferté-Macé in Orne, the former so named from Gallo-Roman Macciacum (from the personal name Maccius + the locative suffix -acum), the latter from the personal name Macé (see 2 above).

variants.name: Massee
meanings: Possibly an altered form of English   Massey  .
French (Massée): from the feminine form of Massé (see Masse ). This surname is rare in France.

variants.name: Massa
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Sal, Antonio, Silvio, Annamarie, Biagio, Caesar, Carmela, Dante, Elisabetta, Ennio.

Italian: habitational name from any of various places called Massa, for example Massa Lubrense or Massa di Somma, both in Naples province, or Masse d'Albe in Aquila, all named from medieval Latin massa ‘farm, estate’ (from Latin massa ‘mass, lump, pile’, Greek maza). This surname is also found in southern France (see Massey 5).

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English personal name Ma(t)thew, a vernacular form of the Greek New Testament name Matthias, Matthaios, which is ultimately from the Hebrew personal name Matityahu ‘gift of God’. This was taken into Latin as Mat(t)hias and Matthaeus respectively, the former being used for the twelfth apostle (who replaced Judas Iscariot) and the latter for the author of the first Gospel. In many European languages this distinction is reflected in different name forms. The commonest vernacular forms of the personal name, including English Matthew, Old French Matheu, Spanish Mateo, Italian Matteo, Portuguese Mateus, Catalan and Occitan Mateu are generally derived from the form Matthaeus. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, including German Matthias , Greek Mathias and Mattheos, Assyrian/Chaldean Matti , Czech Matěj, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Matej . The name Matthew is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Mathai ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Mathew , see also Matthews .

variants.name: Macey
meanings: Americanized form of Slovak and Rusyn (from Slovakia) Macej or Mačej and Polish Maciej , derivatives of the Latin personal name Matthaeus (see Matthew ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord John Massey was born in 1344, in Tatton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Hugh Massey, was 24 and his mother, Alice de Wrenbury, was 24. He had at least 8 sons and 6 daughters with Alice Worsley. In 1389, at the age of 45, his occupation is listed as sheriff of cheshire. He died on 22 July 1403, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord John Massey est né en 1344, à Tatton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Hugh Massey, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Alice de Wrenbury, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 8 fils et 6 filles avec Alice Worsley. En 1389, à l’âge de 45 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of cheshire. Il est décédé le 22 juillet 1403, à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord John Massey 1344 in Tatton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Hugh Massey 24 und seine Mutter Alice de Wrenbury 24. Er hatte mit Alice Worsley mindestens 8 Söhne und 6 Töchter. 1389, als er 45 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of cheshire aufgeführt. Er starb am 22. Juli 1403 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord John Massey è nato il nel 1344 nel Tatton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Hugh Massey, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Wrenbury, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 8 figli e 6 figlie con Alice Worsley. Nel 1389, all'età di 45 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of cheshire. Morì il 22 luglio 1403, nel Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord John Masseyが1344年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアタットオンで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Masseyは24歳，母Alice de Wrenburyは24歳であった。彼はAlice Worsleyとの間に少なくとも8人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。1389年，45歳の時，職業はsheriff of cheshireと記録されている。彼は1403年7月22日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーで59歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアシュリュースブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord John Massey(이)가 1344년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 타턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Hugh Massey(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Wrenbury(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Alice Worsley(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1389년, 45세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of cheshire이었다. 그는 1403년 7월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord John Massey nasceu em 1344, em Tatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Hugh Massey, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Wrenbury, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 8 filhos e 6 filhas com Alice Worsley. Em 1389, com 45 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of cheshire. Ele faleceu em 22 de julho de 1403, em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord John Massey родился в 1344 г. в местности таттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Hugh Massey было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de Wrenbury, 24. У него было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 6 дочерей от Alice Worsley. В 1389 году, в возрасте 45 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of cheshire. Он умер 22 июля 1403 г. в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности шрюсбури, шропшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord John Massey nació en 1344, en Tatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Hugh Massey, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Alice de Wrenbury, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 8 hijos y 6 hijas con Alice Worsley. En 1389, a la edad de 45 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of cheshire. Murió el 22 de julio de 1403, en Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Shrewsbury, Shropshire, Inglaterra.
